scripts.start: node -e "const path = require('path'); const fs = require('fs'); const dbPath = process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH ? path.join(process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH, 'database.sqlite') : path.resolve(__dirname, 'database.sqlite'); if (process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH && !fs.existsSync(process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH)) { fs.mkdirSync(process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH, { recursive: true }); console.log('Created directory:', process.env.RENDER_DISK_PATH); } require('./setupDb.js');" && node server.js
scripts.rebuild: npm rebuild sqlite3 && npm rebuild better-sqlite3
